results.title: Karnataka to get new CM? Siddaramaiah to meet cabinet colleagues on May 28
results.description: Speculation mounts in Karnataka politics as Siddaramaiah plans to meet cabinet colleagues on May 28 regarding a potential CM change.

results.title: Donald Trump’s T1 Mobile Gets Compared to a ‘Urine Sample’
results.description: A tech expert slammed Donald Trump’s T1 Mobile and compared its design and color to that of a “urine sample.” For those unversed, the Trump Mobile phone, named T1, was first announced in June last year. It claims to be made in the U.S. Ever since the announcement, users have been eagerly waiting to get [...] The post Donald Trump’s T1 Mobile Gets Compared to a ‘Urine Sample’ appeared first on Mandatory .
